description.from: Attack frontal enemies in a circular range of self 2 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and knocking them down for 2.5 sec. [Proxy of God] Attacks enemeis in a wider range to deal ??? P.DMG and knock them down for 3.5 sec.
description.to:
Deals 267*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+168.3% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

description.from: Attacks the target 3 times, and then charges behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by 25% for 10 sec. [Proxy of God] Attacks the target 3 times, charging behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by 25% for 10 sec. 500 additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill.
description.to:
Dashes behind the enemy and deals 233*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+146.9% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.
[God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 500 higher.

description.from: Deals ??? P.DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 3 sec. Additionally, for 20 sec, increases self's ATK by ???, ATK Spd by 250, All Dodge Chance by 250, and DMG of normal attacks by 125% while gaining immunity to CC. This effect is irremovable.
description.to:
Deals 200*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+126% ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 2 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills.
[God's Proxy] : ATK increases by 264*(1+0.3*Skill Level), Attack Speed by 30%, Physical Evasion by 300, Normal Attack DMG by 150%, and Status Resistance by 600. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Increases own All DEF by ??? and All Dodge Chance by 200. When equipped with The Holly Sword, Aea, receives the blessing of the goddess that increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 30% and reduces DMG taken from Non-Hero enemies by 30%.
description.to:
Magic DEF increases by 85*(1+0.3*Skill Level), and Magic Evasion increases by 250.
When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 30%, and damage taken is reduced by 30%.

dark.from: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.
dark.to: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.

dark.from: Reduces the target's P.DEF by 30% for 10 sec.
dark.to: On hit, reduces the target’s Physical DEF by 35% for 10 sec.

light.from: Reduces DMG taken by 20% while in [Proxy of God].
light.to: Reduces Physical DMG taken by 25% during the duration.

dark.from: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 100% for the duration of Skill.
dark.to: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 100% during the duration.

description.from: [Judgement Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.
description.to: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.

description.from: [Proxy of God] Additionally, Dodge Rate is increased by 250, and ATK Spd is increased by {0} for the duration of skill.
description.to: [Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 250 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.

description.from: [Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.
description.to: [Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.

description.from: Each attack has a 35% chance to dealing {0}% of ATK as P.DMG. Has 0.5 sec Cooldown.
description.to: On hit, has a 35% chance to deal additional Physical DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. This effect can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
